_comment: Frontier AI lab profiles. tracked=true labs have a lab.html squad page. Facts are best-effort/public.

labs.founders: Sam Altman, Elon Musk, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, others
labs.blurb: The lab that brought LLMs mainstream with ChatGPT. Pursues AGI across language, reasoning, image and video models.
Safety-first lab founded by ex-OpenAI leaders. Known for Claude and pioneering interpretability and constitutional AI.

labs.founders: Demis Hassabis, Shane Legg, Mustafa Suleyman
labs.focus: Solve intelligence, use it for science
labs.blurb: Google's AI lab (merged with Google Brain in 2023). Behind Gemini and Nobel-winning science like AlphaFold.
Meta Superintelligence Labs — the 2025 reorg of Meta's AI effort, aggressively hiring and shipping open-weight Llama models.
Elon Musk's lab, tightly integrated with X. Trains Grok on the Colossus supercluster.

labs.founders: Ilya Sutskever, Daniel Gross, Daniel Levy
labs.blurb: Ilya Sutskever's lab with a single goal: build safe superintelligence, with no intermediate products to distract.

labs.founders: Mira Murati, John Schulman, Barret Zoph, others
labs.blurb: Founded by ex-OpenAI CTO Mira Murati with a star-studded team. One of the most-watched and most-raided new labs.

labs.founders: Arthur Mensch, Guillaume Lample, Timothée Lacroix (ex-Meta/DeepMind)
labs.blurb: Europe's frontier lab, known for strong open-weight models and a sovereignty pitch.
Chinese lab that shocked the market with cheap, open, frontier-level reasoning models.
